business.name: A Revolution LLC
business.tagline: Complete home solutions, one call away

hero.headline: *Everything* under one roof — painting to plumbing
hero.subheadline: The Dothan handyman team that handles kitchens, electrical, flooring, and every job in between.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Kitchen to basement — we handle it all
services_section.subheading: Complete home renovations and repairs by one trusted team

services.title: Kitchen Remodeling
services.description: Cabinet refacing, countertops, plumbing, electrical, and paint. Complete kitchen transformations.

services.title: Interior & Exterior Painting
services.description: Whole house painting with prep work and attention to detail. Fresh walls that get compliments.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.description: New outlets, lighting fixtures, panel upgrades. Safe, code-compliant electrical work.

services.title: Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Sink installations, pipe repairs, fixture replacements. Water flowing where it should.

services.title: Flooring Installation
services.description: Hardwood, tile, vinyl, and carpet. Professional installation with proper prep work.

services.title: Custom Carpentry
services.description: Built-in shelving, trim work, steps, and custom projects. Handcrafted solutions for your space.

about.heading: One team, every trade
about.body: We're the Dothan handyman crew that shows up with the right tools and skills for whatever your home needs. No job too big, no detail too small.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: Incredible job painting our whole house — people comment on the excellent work. They also refaced all the kitchen cabinets perfectly.

reviews.name: Susan E.
reviews.text: Wonderful work! They gave me a new kitchen and dining area with fresh paint, crown molding, new lighting, and sink installation.

reviews.name: Charlotte F.
reviews.text: They've done so many jobs for me — kitchen remodel, electrical, flooring, plumbing, and custom steps. Everything completed successfully and beautifully.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Dothan and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional handyman services throughout the Wiregrass region

cta.heading: Ready to start your next project?
cta.body: From quick repairs to complete renovations, we handle every detail. Get your free estimate today.
